---
title: "Nuclei Isolation Protocol"
author: "Kevin Shih"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 5
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: false
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: pygments
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 5
---

# Nuclei Isolation Protocol Materials
<br>
### Lysis Buffer
  - Lysis Reagent
  - Reducing Agent B
  - Surfactant A
  - RNase Inhibitor
  
<br>
### Debris Removal Buffer
